_note: Frozen baseline for eval/golden.demo.jsonl: repo self-indexed, pure hybrid (RAG_RERANK_AUTO=off), RAG_CHUNK_CONTEXT_PREFIX=on (default). Golden set expanded from 12 to 17 cases with 5 paraphrase cases (queries sharing no identifiers with their target implementations). Hit@5 gated headline; Hit@1/MRR drift as the corpus grows. Stage 2 chunk-prefix ablation: WITH prefix beats WITHOUT by +0.050 MRR / +0.059 Hit@1 on the 17-case set, meeting the ADR-0004 bar. Re-freeze when any metric moves beyond ±5pp from these values.
